content.en:
Ye Tian didn't hesitate much, and resolutely entered the inheritance channel.

As soon as he entered the inheritance channel, an even more terrifying life pressure descended, making Ye Tian crawl forward as if he was carrying a billion-dollar divine mountain on his back.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to seem to have walked through this inheritance passage and came to a huge space.

This is a blood-colored space, on the vast earth, rivers of blood flow, void cracks are everywhere, and endless sorrow fills the surroundings.

Suddenly.

A blood-colored figure appeared and killed Ye Tian.

The speed of the other party is very fast, even comparable to the speed of the True Ancestor, and the aura of the body is at least comparable to that of the top guard-level powerhouse.

While!

Ye Tian blocked the opponent's attack with a knife and fought with the opponent.

After a few moves, Ye Tian slashed the other party with one sword, and then a wave of memories rushed towards Ye Tian and forcibly fused with Ye Tian.

This memory is an insight, or a spiritual memory, which includes many secret techniques, spiritual experiences, and so on.

"Could it be that this is the inheritance!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This way of inheritance is too weird, as if the other party is a memory, and he directly plundered a memory, which is equivalent to obtaining a inheritance.

However, it is a pity that this memory does not contain too amazing inheritance, but for the escort level, this inheritance is quite good, and it involves a lot of knowledge about life, which is very precious to the life green clan.

As Ye Tian advanced, a blood-colored figure came from time to time.

At the beginning, these blood-colored figures were only equivalent to the top guard-level powerhouses, but gradually blood-colored figures that were close to the invincible guard-level powerhouses appeared, even Ye Tian was very difficult to kill them.

In this way, Ye Tian obtained a large number of memory fragment inheritance.

These memory fragments were very messy, and they didn't seem to have any connection, but as more memory fragments merged into Ye Tian's soul, he gradually discovered that these memory fragments should be owned by a living being.

But due to the lack of critical memories, Ye Tian couldn't know the identity of the other party.

"Come on, it's not far from that treasure!"

Ye Tian was a little excited.

This means that he is not far from upgrading his copy talent, and once he is successfully upgraded, how powerful his copy talent should become!

Suddenly.

A blood-colored figure with a terrifying aura appeared, and the aura of the other party was comparable to that of an ordinary Saint Ancestor-level powerhouse.

If Ye Tian was in the ontological state, he was really not afraid of an ordinary Saint Ancestor-level powerhouse, but this body was a temporary reincarnated body, and his combat power was limited, and he had not yet reached the level of a Saint Ancestor-level powerhouse.

As a result, the battle was difficult.

Bang!!!

The battle is on!

At the beginning, Ye Tian was completely suppressed, if it weren't for the fact that the body of the Life Green Clan recovered quickly and had a strong ability to save his life, he would have been killed by the blood-colored figure a long time ago.

Half an hour later, Ye Tian had already suffered heavy losses, and his combat strength had dropped to a certain level, and he would fall at any time.

At this time, Ye Tian made a decision.

"No, I must lift the reincarnation state, otherwise with my current combat power, I won't be able to stay in this inheritance space at all, although after lifting the reincarnation innate nature, it will be more troublesome to leave the Life Divine Mountain, but it's not that there is no hope of escaping!"

As soon as Ye Tian thought about it, he immediately lifted the innate state of reincarnation.

Rumble!!!!

The gate of reincarnation appeared, Ye Tian passed through the gate of reincarnation, the body of the life green clan began to disintegrate, and the body belonging to the human race began to condense.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian had already turned into the body of the human race, and his cultivation had also become a half-step True Ancestor realm, no longer at the level of a guard.

Turning back into the ontological state, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed many times.

"Sky Splitting!"

Ye Tian's Dao technique directly hit this blood-colored figure.

Click!

The blood-colored figure was directly torn apart, and it died instantly, without any life-saving ability, and a powerful memory melted into Ye Tian's soul.

This time, this memory is a little different, this memory is very long, and there is a memory about the Divine Heaven Realm, which also contains a true ancestor's inheritance.

"Keep going!"

Ye Tian continued to walk in the direction of the unknown treasure, and along the way he encountered many blood-colored figures with the strength of the True Ancestor, but they fell and died in Ye Tian's hands, turning into a memory.

With the increase of his memories, Ye Tian gradually understood who the owner of these memories was.

"Green!"

This is the name of the other party, as for what kind of strength the other party is, it is not easy to say, because each memory is in a different era, and the strength of the other party is also different.

And the memories that have been recently accepted show that the other party is already a true ancestor.

But obviously, the True Ancestor couldn't do such a means, and the other party was at least a top Dao Ancestor, and it was even more than that.

He killed a powerful blood-colored figure again, which made Ye Tian fight for half an hour, and he didn't know how many Dao techniques he had released.

And killing the other party with such difficulty allowed Ye Tian to gain a massive amount of memories, which were the memories of the other party after he became a Dao Ancestor.

This kind of memory is precious, allowing Ye Tian to thoroughly understand the path of the Dao Ancestor, and to fill the lack of experience.

Such a benefit is almost impossible to replicate, unless a Dao Ancestor has fallen and his memory is left behind, he can obtain such a benefit, otherwise Dao Ancestor alone will not be able to achieve such a benefit at all.

At this time, Ye Tian felt that he was not far from that treasure.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian came to a small hill, where a small blood-colored tree grew, as if it had been watered with blood.

And the blood-colored tree has a blood-red fruit growing on it, which looks very extraordinary.

"That's the fruit!"

Ye Tian's eyes widened and he said excitedly.

This fruit was the treasure he needed, and once he refined it, his copying talent would inevitably be upgraded.

But what made Ye Tian feel troublesome was that a blood-colored figure was guarding the blood-colored fruit.

This blood-colored figure was stronger than all the previous blood-colored figures, and its strength was probably enough to compare to the top mid-stage Great Dao True Ancestor, and even comparable to the late Great Dao True Ancestor.

Ye Tian estimated that he was not the opponent of the other party, so he could only barely compete with one or two.

"No matter!"

Ye Tian rushed forward and fought with the blood-colored figure.

Sure enough, as soon as the fight began, Ye Tian was injured.

But with the strength of various Dao techniques, Ye Tian stubbornly blocked the opponent's attack.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian seized an opportunity and cast the three-in-one divine power, the physical strength and divine power turned into soul power, and at the same time cast the chaotic divine power of endless sinking, instantly confusing the other party.

Taking advantage of this opportunity, Ye Tianyi grabbed the blood-red fruit and quickly left.

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and after casting the Dao technique of spatial escape, he quickly shook off the blood-colored figure.

Afterwards, Ye Tian found a quiet and safe place and began refining the blood-red fruit.

He's going to upgrade his Copying Talent here, and maybe the new Copying Talent will help him get out of trouble!
